description.value: It's not your fault being the biggest and the strongest. When fighting is inevitable, you've learned to use your superior bulk to grab and restrain smaller enemies. If nothing else, a foe in your grasp is less likely to harm your allies. Your powerful upper limbs have had plenty of practice wrestling, grabbing, and restraining smaller foes. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus on Athletics checks to [[/act grapple]] foes that are at least one size category smaller than you.
